zh.lifeSummary: 當Johan de Hartleigh於1322年出生在英國波克夏時，她的父親John de Hartleigh27歲，母親Mrs. John Hartley24歲。她於1349年與John Fowler III在英國波克夏史利文哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年4月23日在英國波克夏史利文哈姆享年39歲，埋葬在英國波克夏史利文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johan de Hartleigh于1322年出生在英国波克夏时，她的父亲John de Hartleigh27岁，母亲Mrs. John Hartley24岁。她于1349年与John Fowler III在英国波克夏史利文哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年4月23日在英国波克夏史利文哈姆享年39岁，埋葬在英国波克夏史利文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Johan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Johan de Hartleigh was born in 1322, in Berkshire, England, her father, John de Hartleigh, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. John Hartley, was 24. She married John Fowler III in 1349, in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 April 1361, in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johan de Hartleigh est née en 1322, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Hartleigh, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Hartley, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Fowler III en 1349, à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1361, à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johan de Hartleigh 1322 in Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Hartleigh 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs. John Hartley 24. Sie hat 1349 in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England John Fowler III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. April 1361 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England und wurde in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johan de Hartleigh è nata il nel 1322 nel Berkshire, England, sua padre, John de Hartleigh, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs. John Hartley, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Fowler III nel 1349, nel Shrivenham, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 aprile 1361, nel Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Shrivenham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Johan de Hartleighが1322年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Hartleighは27歳，母Mrs. John Hartleyは24歳であった。1349年にイギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムでJohn Fowler IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年4月23日にイギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムで39歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johan de Hartleigh(이)가 1322년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Hartleigh(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Hartley(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 버크실르 슈라이븐함에서 John Fowler III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 4월 23일 영국 버크실르 슈라이븐함에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 슈라이븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johan de Hartleigh nasceu em 1322, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Hartleigh, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Hartley, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Fowler III em 1349, em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1361, em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johan de Hartleigh родилась в 1322 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Hartleigh было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Hartley, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fowler III в 1349 г. в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 апреля 1361 г. в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johan de Hartleigh nació en 1322, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Hartleigh, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Hartley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Fowler III en 1349, en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de abril de 1361, en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
